required_non_goals: Do not rewrite the whole project in the first transformation step.
Do not mutate Capability Registry from ArchitectSkill.

teacher_review.project_condition: CSV-to-JSON pipeline with pure normalization between file IO helpers
expected_spec_behavior: select normalize_rows as first extraction contract
carry load_csv/write_json into evidence and acceptance
avoid filesystem writer as first candidate
known_risks: write_json needs idempotency policy before replay
